text: Here, in the quiet spaciousness of the first room, I feel a sense of anticipation and possibility. The soft lighting and open design provoke reflection; I am an observer preparing for something to begin. In the next space, color and activity burst forth. The display’s emphasis on research and development imbues the environment with intellectual curiosity. Surrounded by ideas and innovation, I feel energized and thoughtful, aware of human creativity interwoven with technology. This contrast between serene openness and vibrant exploration awakens both introspection and wonder in me.
